---
title: "Lab Gallery"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
resources:
  - memory.json
  - images/memory/**
---

<a id="back" href="gallery.html">Gallery</a>

<h1 id="year-title"></h1>

::: {#gallery .gallery}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
#year-title {
  position: fixed !important;
  top: 200px;
  left: 30px;
  z-index: 1000;
  font-size: 40px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: #ffffff;
  text-shadow: 
    0 0 20px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.8),
    0 0 40px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.8);
  transition: text-shadow 0.5s ease;
}

#back {
  position: fixed !important;
  top: 200px;
  right: 30px;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(100, 200, 255, 1);
  transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
  animation: breathe 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 20px;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

#back:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4), 0 0 80px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.15);
  transform: scale(1.1);
  color: #ffffff;
}

@keyframes breathe {
  0%, 100% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.12), 0 0 30px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.05);
  }
  50% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3), 0 0 60px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.12);
  }
}

.gallery {
  column-count: 3;
  column-gap: 20px;
  max-width: 1300px;
  margin: 0 auto 60px;
  padding: 0 20px;
}

.item {
  break-inside: avoid;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(16px);
  animation: fade 0.45s forwards;
  box-shadow: 
    0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
    0 0 30px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.03);
  border-radius: 16px;
  transition: box-shadow 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
  position: relative;
}

.item:hover {
  box-shadow: 
    0 8px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
    0 0 50px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.08);
  transform: scale(1.01);
}

.item img,
.item video {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 16px;
}


.play-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  font-size: 48px;
  color: white;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  width: 60px;
  height: 60px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  z-index: 2;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.play-overlay:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1);
}

.item video {
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

@keyframes fade {
  to { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
}

@media (max-width: 1000px) {
  .gallery { column-count: 2; }
}

@media (max-width: 650px) {
  .gallery { column-count: 1; }
  #year-title { font-size: 32px; }
}
</style>

<script>
const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
const year = params.get("year");
document.getElementById("year-title").textContent = year || "Gallery";

fetch("memory.json")
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const gallery = document.getElementById("gallery");
    const items = data.filter(x => String(x.year) === String(year));
    
    items.forEach((p, i) => {
      const d = document.createElement("div");
      d.className = "item";
      d.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.05) + "s";
      
      if (p.type === "video") {
        
        const poster = p.file + "#t=1";
        d.innerHTML = `
          <video controls preload="none" poster="${poster}" class="lazy-video">
            <source data-src="${p.file}" type="video/mp4">
            
          </video>
          <div class="play-overlay">▶</div>
        `;
        gallery.appendChild(d);
        
        const video = d.querySelector('video');
        const overlay = d.querySelector('.play-overlay');
        
        const loadVideo = function(e) {
          if (e) e.stopPropagation();
          const source = this.querySelector('source');
          if (!source.src && source.dataset.src) {
            source.src = source.dataset.src;
            this.load();
          }
          if (this.paused) {
            this.play();
          }
          
          overlay.style.display = 'none';
        };
        
        
        video.addEventListener('play', function() {
          overlay.style.display = 'none';
        });
        
        video.addEventListener('pause', function() {
          
          if (!this.ended) {
            overlay.style.display = 'flex';
          }
        });
        
        video.addEventListener('ended', function() {
          overlay.style.display = 'flex';
        });
        
        video.addEventListener('click', loadVideo);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          loadVideo.call(video, e);
        });
        
      } else {
        d.innerHTML = `<a href="${p.file}" target="_blank">
          <img src="${p.file}" loading="lazy">
        </a>`;
        gallery.appendChild(d);
      }
    });
  });
</script>
